description: Automated response to elevated Lambda error rate alarms. Captures logs, notifies on-call, and optionally rolls back the last deployment.

steps.name: capture_lambda_logs
steps.description: Capture the last 30 minutes of ERROR-level log events from the affected Lambda function.

steps.name: notify_oncall
steps.description: Alert the on-call engineer with context about the alarm and captured logs.

params.message: High Lambda error rate detected. Runbook triggered — captured 30 min of logs. Review CloudWatch Logs Insights for root cause.

steps.name: notify_pagerduty
steps.description: Create a PagerDuty incident for tracking and escalation.

params.message: SecureBase: High Lambda error rate detected. Automated runbook steps executed. Manual review required.

post_incident_actions: Review CloudWatch Logs Insights: filter by ERROR level, last 1 hour
Check recent deployments in CodeDeploy or GitHub Actions
Review Lambda configuration changes in CloudTrail
If error rate exceeds 10%, consider rolling back the last deployment
